app.title: Wodates
app.taglineSub: For people seeking a stable relationship

deepOnboarding.validationIncomplete: Please answer every question in this block.
deepOnboarding.validationMultiOther: Please complete the text for any «Other» option you selected.
deepOnboarding.validationTextLength: Some answers exceed the maximum length.
deepOnboarding.saveError: Could not save your answers. Please try again.
deepOnboarding.createAccountSubtitle: Final step: create your account with the same details you edit in your profile.

questionnaire.hubSubtitle: Your signup is complete. You can review or edit any section.
questionnaire.hubFooter: We'll start looking for the most promising affinities for you. We'll share more information soon.

hubCards.title: Your way of being
hubCards.subtitle: How you connect, decide, and move through everyday life.

hubCards.title: Your lifestyle
hubCards.subtitle: Your pace, your habits, and the plans you enjoy most.

hubCards.title: What you're looking for
hubCards.subtitle: Your intention, values, and vision for partnership.

hubCards.title: Real-life fit
hubCards.subtitle: What needs to work in day-to-day life together.

auth.loginContextSub: For people who are done with swipe culture.
auth.manualRecoveryIntro: For now, account recovery is handled manually.
auth.manualRecoveryAfterEmail: from the same address you used to register, and we'll help you recover your account.
auth.manualRecoveryNoteBody: To protect your account, we may ask for extra verification.

register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.birthdateRequired: Birthdate is required and must be valid
register.minAgeGreaterThanMax: Minimum age can't be greater than maximum age

register.changeLater: You can change this preference later.

register.minAgeError: You must be at least {{min}} years old to sign up
register.maxAgeError: The maximum allowed age is {{max}} years
register.futureDateError: You can't select a future date
register.emailContactHint: This is the email we'll use to get in touch with you.
register.socialInterestDescription: Seen someone on social media and curious if you might be a good fit? Add up to 3 profile codes that caught your attention.
register.socialInterestFootnote: * Adding a code does not limit your search to that profile. We'll still consider other compatible matches for you.
register.socialInterestInvalidCode: Each code can use letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores (2–48 characters).
register.saveInterestCodesError: We couldn't save the codes. Please try again—or contact us if this keeps happening.

common.createAccountBodyDiscover: To like or pass on real profiles, you need an account. It takes less than 1 minute.
common.createAccountBodyChats: To keep chatting with Doc Love, you need an account. It takes less than 1 minute.
common.createAccountBodyProfile: To set your preferences and unlock your profile, you need an account. It takes less than 1 minute.
common.selectPhotoFrom: Where would you like to get your photo from?
common.tapToChangePhoto: Tap the button to change the photo
common.photoFromComputer: You can select a photo from your computer

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.signInError: Couldn't sign in. Please check your credentials.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is unavailable right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.loadProfileRetry: Could not load profile. Please try again.
errors.saveAgeRangeError: Could not save age range. Please try again.
errors.saveChangeError: Could not save change. Please try again.
errors.deactivateError: Could not deactivate account. Please try again.
errors.accountDeactivatedBody: Your account has been deactivated. Contact support if you want to reactivate it.

feed.discoverResumes: Discover resumes when you close your active chat.
feed.emptyNoCandidates: No profiles to show right now. Try refreshing, or check back later.
feed.emptyQuality: Wodates prioritizes quality over quantity. Improve your affinity by talking with Doc Love.
feed.affinityFallback: Initial affinity is low—conversation will sharpen recommendations.

matches.notificationMessage: You have a new exclusive chat with {{name}}. Discover has been paused so you can get to know each other.

openers: Nice to meet you here 🙂 No rush — happy to start easy and see how it feels.
Good to see you here. I'm more into calm, genuine chats than forced small talk.
A pleasure to meet you 🙂 Just saying hi properly — happy to keep this simple.
Glad we matched. If now's hectic, no worries — when you get a moment, I'd love to hear what kind of chat you enjoy.
Hello 🙂 I like that we're focusing on one conversation at a time — no pressure, just happy to say hi.
Hey! It's been a good day — hope yours is going well too.
Pleasure meeting you. Want to start with something light, or something a bit more real?
Hi there 🙂 We can go slow and casual, or be a bit more direct — whatever feels best.
Good evening. Pick a lane: plans / work / interests / life — I'll follow.
Nice to meet you 🙂 Would you rather do one question each, or just chat naturally?
Glad we crossed paths. We can keep it short-and-sweet, or do proper messages — whatever feels easiest.
Hello! We can keep it short-and-sweet, or do proper messages — your call.
Hey 🙂 Either we start super light, or we skip to something meaningful — both work for me.
Hi! 🙂 What kind of pace feels comfortable for you when getting to know someone?
Not going to do the empty "how are you?" — what's been the best part of your week so far?
Hi! What's a topic you actually enjoy talking about, even with someone new?
Good to see you here 🙂 What's a small thing that's made you smile recently?
Honestly curious — what's a green flag you appreciate early on?
No pressure at all: are you more of a quick replier, or more 'when I can'?
Nice to meet you 🙂 If we start with one thing, what would you like to know about me first?
chat.docLoveInfoParagraph1: Doc Love helps you discover better matches by asking thoughtful questions over time.
chat.docLoveInfoParagraph2: If you don't feel like answering a question, you can simply skip it or ask for a different one. You can answer briefly or go into more detail — whatever feels natural.
chat.docLoveInfoParagraph3: What you share with Doc Love (and your in-app chats) helps Wodates improve your future match recommendations.
chat.docLoveInfoParagraph4: One key rule: you can only have one active human chat at a time — while you're matched, Discover pauses.

modals.startExclusiveWith: Do you want to start an exclusive conversation with {{name}}?
modals.discoverPauseExplanation: If you continue, Discover will pause so you can focus on this exclusive conversation.
modals.photoOptionsMessage: What would you like to do with this photo?

profile.bioPlaceholder: Your profile will grow as you connect with other people.
profile.showBioInFeedOff: If you turn this off, your bio won't be visible to others and you won't be able to see theirs.
profile.choosePhotoComputer: Choose a photo from your computer
profile.whereGetPhoto: Where would you like to get your photo from?
profile.publicProfileCodeUnavailableHint: This code is set when your account is created. Pull down to refresh. If it stays empty, the database migration may not be applied yet.
profile.publicProfileCodeHint: This is your unique code on Wodates. Others can use it when they add profile codes they noticed on socials.
profile.labelWantsChildren: Do you want to have children in the future?
profile.labelCarePartnerChildren: Does it matter to you if the other person has children?
profile.labelCarePartnerSmoking: Does it matter to you if the other person smokes?
profile.socialInterestManageDescription: You can enter or change up to 3 profile codes anytime. They're saved automatically, like other fields here.
profile.sessionInvalid: Your session is not valid. Please sign in again to view your profile.
profile.messageMinLength: The message must be at least 10 characters
profile.messageSentSuccess: Your message has been sent successfully.
profile.deleteAccountTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountBody: This action cannot be undone. You will lose your profile, your matches and your messages.
profile.selfieReceivedBody: We've received your selfie. Our team will review your verification shortly.
profile.verifyDescription: Upload a clear selfie to confirm it's really you. It won't appear on your profile.
profile.verifySelfieHint: Use a clear photo, with good lighting and your full face visible.
profile.mainPhotoSetMessage: The photo has been set as your main photo

manifesto.title: Wodates Manifesto
manifesto.connectionNotAlgorithms: Connection should not depend on secret algorithms.
manifesto.deserveToKnow: You deserve to know why you're seeing someone.
manifesto.deserveFocus: You deserve focus. Not infinite options.
